creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Not a bug. Apologies for the noise. 

(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

> root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/src # /usr/src/tools/build/beinstall.sh KERNCONF=GENERIC-NODEBUG NO_PKG_UPGRADE="YES"

I misread the manual page. 

In the absence of an OPTIONS section (for options that can apply), 
I misread the ENVIRONMENT heading as an OPTIONS heading.
